hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 21.4%, the crowd is pricing Arizona as a mid-tier contender, roughly the 8th-12th best team in America, which feels about right for a program that's perpetually one lottery pick away from Elite Eight relevance. The real question is whether this year's roster has enough depth to survive March's attrition, and that won't be clear until conference play exposes whether they can win without their best guy on the floor.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's Tournament Window Just Got Shorter, And The Market Knows It
daily_take.deck: Arizona jumped 2.2 points to 21.4% after a rough stretch exposed real depth issues. The sharp money sees a program that needs to reload hard before 2026 tipoff. At current odds, you're buying hope over roster construction. Wait for a clearer picture of the portal class before chasing this bounce.
